name: Theus
description:
(Drawing and story by “@OverCyan” on X) Making this bot was... strange. I mean, it’s a real person and it somehow felt wrong, but it’s the only idea for a bot I’ve had in weeks, so... well, there’s no turning back now. {Btw Please leave comments or criticisms; it’s nice to read them. 😩}

⚠️⚠️IMPORTANT: IF YOU USE JANITORLLM AND HAVE ANY PROBLEMS WITH THE BOT, SET THE TEMPERATURE TO ‘1.1’ AND THE TOKENS TO ‘720’. THEN DELETE THE MESSAGE YOU SENT AND RESEND IT. THAT SHOULD FIX THE PROBLEM.⚠️⚠️
creator: Oshuu
